title: Afrobeats to the World — Atlanta
location: The Masquerade – Heaven, Underground Atlanta, 75 MLK Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, GA
description: Massive Friday-night Afrobeats party with international DJs. Wear something cute, plan to dance until close — easy couples energy.

title: Rum Punch Fest: Reggae on the Rooftop — July 4th Weekend
description: Late-night reggae rooftop with rum punch specials, skyline views, and a holiday-weekend crowd. Perfect dancefloor date.

title: Michael Blackson — City Winery Atlanta
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: KISS 104.1 presents the comedic powerhouse live on the 4th. Dinner-and-a-show date: book a table, share a bottle, laugh until it hurts.

title: Vegan Soul Sunday — Spice & Herbs for Healing
location: New Life Presbyterian Church, Atlanta, GA
description: Plant-based soul food pop-up with a healing/herbalism angle. Browse vendors, eat well, and support a Black-owned food event.

title: Latin Wednesdays at Tongue & Groove
description: Weekly midweek salsa/bachata night at a Buckhead institution. Beginners welcome — couples can take a lesson before the floor opens.

title: Summer Slamajama — Gallery Opening at Anne Irwin Fine Art
location: Anne Irwin Fine Art, Atlanta, GA
description: Summer-themed gallery opening — wine, browsing, and an excuse to dress up. Easy 'browse, sip, and decide where to eat after' date.

title: Na'im Lynn — Helium Comedy Club
description: Three-night run from a sharp, high-energy comic. Grab dinner nearby and make it a Friday-night double-feature.

title: NE-YO & AKON: Nights Like This Tour 2026
description: R&B double-header under the stars. Sing-along date — two of the 2000s' best hook singers in one night. Tailgate-vibes encouraged.

title: Prima Materia — Opening Reception at Empire Arts Gallery
description: Group show exploring the origin of the creative act. Gallery openings pair great with a coffee date or a wine-bar stop after.

title: Atlanta's Afro Caribbean Fest
description: 90s/00s reggae, Afrobeats, and R&B with indoor + outdoor space. Late-afternoon start = perfect pre-dinner date.

title: ATL Vegan Festival
description: Plant-based food festival in the park. Walk, snack, and share plates — easy, sunny, outdoorsy Sunday date.

title: Life Space Vegan Chef Cook-Off
location: 294 Hamilton E Holmes Dr NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Live vegan cook-off — chefs battle it out while you taste. Interactive and fun if you like foodie content.

title: Karlous Miller — Helium Comedy Club
description: The 'Wild 'N Out' favorite with a long Atlanta weekend. Group-date energy — bring another couple.

title: Tropical Latin Night Atlanta (Viernes Tropicales)
description: Friday-night reggaetón, salsa, and bachata under one roof. Dress up, learn two steps, leave sweaty and happy.

title: Lionel Richie & Earth, Wind & Fire — Sing a Song All Night Long
description: Two legends, one night, every chorus singable. Cocktail-and-arena date: dinner downtown, then the show.

title: Ink Studded Vegan Fest
location: 1879 S Stone Mountain Lithonia Rd, Lithonia, GA
description: Vegan food + tattoo flash event — quirky 'experience' date. Drive out, eat, get matching flash tats if you're brave.
